complianceBuckets.description: Low-performing auditees grouped into compliance percentage buckets (0–15%, 15–25%, 25–50%), showing auditee count per occupied bucket.

top3OverallLowPerformers.description: Top 3 auditees with the absolute lowest achieved compliance percentage across all low-compliance buckets combined, sorted ascending by achievedPercentage.

zoneComplianceOverview.description: Count of audits per zone where Achieved Percentage < 50%, sorted by count descending.
